# State Street

> A lightweight, zero-dependency reactive single-page-app framework. Components are
> plain functions that return HTML strings; one reactive state object drives
> dependency-gated re-renders. It is NOT React/Vue/Svelte — it has no JSX, virtual
> DOM, hooks, or router. If you are an AI coding agent, read the agent guide first.

## Agent guide (read first)

- [Full agent guide](https://joshabracks.github.io/State-Street/llms-full.txt): mental model, core API, template + directive syntax, reactivity rules, common gotchas, and canonical examples — written to prevent React/Vue assumptions.

## Documentation

- [Documentation site](https://joshabracks.github.io/State-Street/): getting started, core concepts, templates & rendering, API reference, reactivity & performance, patterns, FAQ.
- [Live examples](https://joshabracks.github.io/State-Street/#examples): runnable todo, form, tabs, modal, fetch, stopwatch, and a client-side AI Studio.

## Source & package

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/Joshabracks/State-Street)
- [npm: @state-street/state-street](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@state-street/state-street)
